www.databricks.com.note: Server-rendered customer stories at /customers/{slug} extract cleanly via Readability. The /customers index is an SPA; enumerate slugs from https://www.databricks.com/en-customer-assets/sitemap/sitemap-index.xml (resolves to sitemap-0.xml with 415+ /customers/{slug} URLs).

www.snowflake.com.note: Homepage/marketing pages render via desktop-chrome, but customer listings (/en/customers/, /en/customers/all-customers/) are a client-rendered AEM+React SPA: raw HTML ~168KB returns ~50 bytes of readable text and contains no customer URLs; the AEM all-customers.model.json carries only page chrome. sitemap_index.xml exposes only ~5 English case-study resource pages (mostly /resource/case-study-* and /resource/customer-case-study-*); /resource/ slugs change/404 frequently. There is no public listing endpoint for customer slugs — neither --via-reader nor --via-wayback recovers the cards. Use the official Snowflake API/PR feed or a headless browser to enumerate customers.
